title: Shipwright Run Config (schemaVersion 2)
description: Authoritative shape of shipwright_run_config.json for the multi-session pipeline orchestrator. Vertragsschicht for the shipwright-webui repo (schema v3 of sdk-sessions.json mirrors phase_tasks[]).

schemaVersion.description: Hard cut: orchestrator phase-lifecycle subcommands reject anything other than 2.

runId.description: Stable run identifier. 'run-' + first 8 hex chars of a uuid4.

mode.description: Pipeline execution mode (Campaign 2026-07-07 SS1, additive). 'multi_session' (default + stable fallback): each phase runs as its own external UUID-bound Claude session (the pre-SS1 behaviour). 'single_session': the /shipwright-run master drives every phase via a phase-runner subagent in ONE conversation (the campaign model). OPTIONAL and NOT in 'required': configs written before SS1 carry no 'mode' and are read as multi_session (back-compat). An unrecognised value is also read as multi_session so a typo can't select an unbuilt path.

securityEnabled.description: Frozen at run creation from AIKIDO_CLIENT_ID env. Mid-run env changes do not affect this.

splitMode.description: Frozen at design-stop. null until then.

splits_frozen.description: Frozen at design-stop. Empty list means single-pass build (splitMode=none) or design has not yet completed.

phase_history.description: Iterate 12.0 (ADR-027) per-phase audit trail. Unchanged from v1.

iterate_history.description: Legacy field; new entries live under .shipwright/agent_docs/iterates/.

sessionUuid.description: Pre-bound at planning time. Used by phase_session_start.py for sessionUuid-match discovery.

version.description: Bumped by recover-phase-task. Used in CAS by complete-phase-task and mark-phase-failed.

launchCommandHint.description: Display-only hint. Authoritative launch command may differ (WebUI generates its own).

claimedBySessionUuid.description: Set by claim-phase-task. Cleared by recover-phase-task.

result.description: Populated on terminal status. Includes ok flag and artifacts list.

allOf.description: Plan-state and build-state phase tasks may have splitId; everyone else must have null.
